strings.name: MawaggaliMappers
strings.description: YouthMappers chapter at St. Mawaggali Trades Training Institute
strings.extendedDescription: We are the YouthMappers chapter at St. Mawaggali Trades in Choma who want to contribute the different humantarian tasks to serve lives through mapping.
